title: 2025-26 CDIS Undergraduates Honored at Chancellor’s Awards Ceremony
summary_en: Join us in celebrating with the CDIS students honored at Chancellor’s Undergraduate Awards Ceremony on April 28, 2026. They were selected for their academic excellence, public service and undergraduate research at the University of Wisconsin–Madison. …
title_cn: 2025—2026学年CDIS本科生在校监奖颁奖典礼上获表彰
summary_cn: 近日，相关高校举办2025—2026学年校监奖颁奖典礼，对学业表现优异、综合素质突出的在校全日制本科生予以集中表彰，本次共有多名数字与信息科学学院（英文简称CDIS）本科生获评该奖项。

title: Apply to SAIL, a hands-on AI summer program
summary_en: School of Computer, Data & Information Sciences Wisconsin Summer of AI Laboratory (SAIL).
title_cn: 欢迎申报实践型人工智能暑期项目SAIL
